description_for_human: AI-powered inventory management for food trucks and restaurants. Track stock, predict sales, scan invoices, connect SumUp.
description_for_model: FoodTracks is a SaaS platform for food truck and restaurant inventory management. It offers AI-powered sales predictions (92% accuracy), real-time stock tracking, invoice scanning via phone camera, SumUp payment integration, and margin analytics. Pricing: Free (1 location, 50 products), Pro €29/month (unlimited). Based in France, GDPR compliant, data on European servers. Available in French and English at https://foodtracks.io
